meta.head: 9bbd01ce9983daea4ccf89ade16c77433ce1ec5a
notes: Ownership reflects surviving lines authored within the 365d lookback; lines older than the shallow-clone boundary are not attributed.
Identity bridge: git-email↔github-login via 8279 squash-PR matches + GitHub noreply emails.

engineers.name: Paul D'Ambra
evidence: Strongest on Influence / centrality (99th percentile in cohort).
Wrote 90,075 lines of meaningful change with 86% still surviving at HEAD.
Left 235 substantive reviews across 55 distinct PR authors.
Primary owner of 376 hot, load-bearing files.
